hero.headline: You've paid tens of thousands in rent.
hero.headline2: What do you have to show for it?
hero.subheadline: EUDA is the first platform that takes a slice of what rent costs you and puts it somewhere it can grow. You pay the same. Your landlord gets the same.

howItWorks.title: How it Works
howItWorks.p1: Every month you pay rent through EUDA, a portion goes into your
howItWorks.p2: It adds up quietly. 12 months later you have real money that came entirely from rent you were already paying.
howItWorks.landlord: Your landlord doesn't need to do anything

socialProof.text: Built by lifelong renters who are done watching it disappear.

about.title: About EUDA
about.p1: Renting was supposed to be temporary. For most of us, it isn't anymore.
about.p2post: on rent. None of it comes back.
about.p3: EUDA doesn't change what you pay. It changes what happens to it.
about.p4pre: We intercept a small portion of what was already leaving - from interest on your payment, from utility switches, from local spending - and we put it in a
about.p4post: with your name on it. It's yours. It moves with you when you move. And it grows every single month, whether you think about it or not.
about.p5: We're building this now. If you're a renter who's done watching rent disappear, get on the list.
